nodes.name: HN Algolia — Search Buyer-Intent Stories
nodes.notes: Free, no-auth HN search via Algolia. Replaces the original Apify LinkedIn jobs scraper, which depended on a non-existent actor (apify/linkedin-jobs-scraper) and would have required a paid actor + brittle anti-bot handling. HN posts mentioning churn/Gainsight/CS-Ops migrations are higher-intent buyer signal than tangential job postings.
